metadata.title: Loo map - Find the nearest toilet in Japan
metadata.description: Find nearby public toilets across Japan. Color-coded pins (blue = free to use, yellow = ask staff, red = permission needed) and 1-5 star cleanliness ratings. Tap to find one in 3 taps.

onboarding.intro: Find a nearby public toilet in 3 taps or fewer.
onboarding.colorLine: Blue = free to use / Yellow = ask staff first / Red = permission needed
onboarding.pinTap: Tap a pin for details, distance, and a "Take me there" route
onboarding.review: After using one, leave a review or report "not usable" to help the next person
onboarding.favorite: Save places you visit often as favorites
onboarding.disclaimer: Note: some pins are estimated. If something is wrong, please report "couldn't use it".
onboarding.etiquetteTitle: How to use a Japanese toilet (for first-time visitors)
onboarding.etiquetteSit: Please sit down to use it (don't stand or squat over it)
onboarding.etiquettePaper: Flush toilet paper down the toilet — do NOT put it in the trash bin
onboarding.etiquetteNoStand: Do not stand on the toilet seat

open.label: Free to use
open.desc: Convenience stores, stations, public toilets — just walk in

ask.label: Ask staff first
ask.desc: Office buildings, shops — ask a quick word before using

permission.label: Permission needed
permission.desc: Hotels, members-only facilities — you need permission to use

pinSheet.ratingNote: fewer than 10 reviews — for reference only
pinSheet.report: Report: no toilet here / couldn't use it
pinSheet.inferredNoteWithHours: Estimated from facility data. Whether a toilet actually exists / can be used is unverified. Hours: {hours}. Please report the actual situation!
pinSheet.inferredNoteNoHours: Estimated from facility data. Whether a toilet actually exists / can be used is unverified. Usable only during the facility's opening hours. Please report the actual situation!
pinSheet.shareDefault: A toilet I found on Loo map

review.rateLimit: You can post about the same toilet once per hour.
review.thanks: Thank you! Your submission has been received.
review.errStarAccess: Please select a star rating and an access level.
review.reportWarning: If 5 or more reports come in, this pin is automatically hidden. Please give honest feedback to help the next person.
review.reportPlaceholder: e.g. no toilet at all / customers only and was refused / closed outside opening hours

search.placeholder: Search a place (e.g. Hakata Station, Tenjin, Canal City)

list.noResultsHint: Remove filters / move to a different area on the map

map.emptyFilteredHint: Remove filters or try a different area
map.emptyArea: No toilet data in this area yet
map.emptyAreaHint: Zoom out / move to another city / add one to grow the map

install.iosHint: To install as an app: tap the Share button → "Add to Home Screen"

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong while displaying this screen
errorBoundary.hint: This may be a temporary issue. Please try reloading.

legalNotice.japaneseOnly: This page is available in Japanese only.
